creator: freebsd-bt@beatsnet.com
text:
Hi,

13.2-STABLE FreeBSD 13.2-STABLE #0 2f57ef2d3  amd64
wireshark-4.0.4  nox11 FLAVOR  (tshark)

If i unset GUI i see that qt5 dependencies get collected. After some retries i realized, that anytime i "make options" GUI is always set again. This option seems obviously not stored properly.. 

also a "make FLAVOR=nox11" seems not to be respected.
